hyperedges.label: JSON Sentinel Output Protocol (PS scripts + parser)
Auth Store Log Aggregation and UI Display Flow
Bulk User Creation Flow: CreateUsersView → usersStore.runBulkCreate → IPC → PowerShell
Pinia Store Coordination: usersStore calls authStore for logging and toast notifications on every IPC action
License Display Pipeline: usersStore.licenseMap + humanLicenseLabel → UsersView badges & DashboardView bars

nodes.label: Users Store State: users, licenses, csvEntries, bulkRunning, failedUsers
Users Store Getters: totalUsers, activeUsers, inactiveUsers, licensedUsers, licenseMap
SKU Part Number to Human Label Mapping (A1/A3/A5, Exchange, Teams, Intune etc.)
CreateUsersView — User Creation & CSV Import View
CreateUsersView: Single User Tab (form + UPN preview)
CreateUsersView: CSV Import Tab (preview table + bulk run)
createSingleUser() — wraps single entry into csvEntries then runBulkCreate
DashboardView: License Overview with bar chart progress
UsersView — User Management Table with Modals
UsersView: Filter/Sort/Pagination (search, status, dept, sort key)
UsersView: Edit User Modal (attributes + license assignment)
UsersView: Delete User Modal (UPN confirmation required)
UsersView: local licenseLabel() bridging licenseMap + humanLicenseLabel
README: MS-365 User Management Tool Documentation
Design Decision: Bulk create only creates NEW users — existing UPN = error, no update
Feature: Auto A3 License Assignment (Schüler/Lehrer) on new user creation
Security: Passwords in-memory only, temp CSV deleted, OAuth2 delegated auth
Design Note: UPN Normalization implemented in 4 places (index.js, ps1, editor.html, CreateUsersView)
IPC Channel Catalogue: get-users, update-user, reset-password, reset-mfa, open-csv-dialog, get-csv-data, set-csv-data, run-password-update, check-pwsh
Rationale: No backend server — all local via PowerShell + Graph, no persistent DB
claude.md: Claude Working Instructions for this Repo
Instruction: Read project.md first as single source of truth before any work
App Icon: Microsoft 365 style hexagonal logo (blue-purple gradient)
UI Screenshot: Dashboard view showing stats (2081 total, 2077 active, 4 disabled, 1832 licensed), quick actions, available licenses list with usage bars
UI Design: Dark theme (GitHub-style dark), sidebar navigation, card-based layout
UI Element: License usage progress bars with color-coded saturation (green/yellow/red)
